citation_collision.reason: Two distinct official AVIQ documents used the same three page citation paths with different bodies and URLs; the consolidated schedule receives a source-specific parent path.

canonicalization.dates: preserve ISO dates; normalize version-suffixed YYYY-MM-DD-* values to their sourced YYYY-MM-DD prefix

external_ambiguity_choices.reason: Select the official GPedia September 2024 amount schedule rather than later secondary reproductions.
RuleSpec encodes the pre-2025/historical RD38 contribution surface; select the dedicated historical official extract.

canonicalization.missing_required_fields: derive only from tracked citation path, source URL, source input path, or deterministic citation identity; every addition is listed per row
canonicalization.parents: reuse an exact selected/existing parent when available; otherwise derive a bodyless document parent solely from parent_id and repeated source-document metadata
canonicalization.preservation_contract: Every rulespec-be local body byte sequence, source_url, and source_path is unchanged in its mapped target row.
canonicalization.row_serialization: UTF-8 canonical JSON (sorted keys, compact separators), one row per line
canonicalization.version: set every selected row version to 2026-07-10-be-rulespec-source-promotion

derived_parent_rows.method: derived only from parent_id and source-document metadata repeated on selected children
